name: Revenant Prime
description: The lost one rises. Reify the essence of the Eidolon as you wield Revenant Prime’s power.
passiveDescription: Shield depletion smashes enemies within |RADIUS|m with a |DAMAGE| Damage knockdown shockwave.

abilities.name: Enthrall
abilities.description: Convert a target into a zealous thrall. Thralls turn on their allies and enthrall through damage. On death, they disintegrate into a damaging pillar of energy. The thrall horde remains under Revenants spell until this ability runs out.

abilities.name: Mesmer Skin
abilities.description: Become enveloped in Sentient energy, redirecting damage and stunning all those who dare attack. Stunned enemies can be Enthralled at no energy cost.

abilities.name: Reave
abilities.description: Dash through enemies as a wall of sentient energy, leeching shields and health from any encountered, enhanced for thralls.

abilities.name: Danse Macabre
abilities.description: Erupt with a multitude of Eidolon energy beams and sweep a circle of death around Revenant. The beams will modify their Damage Type to target select defenses, while incoming damage is redirected back into the beams. Hold fire to boost Status Effects and Damage, at the cost of increased energy consumption. Thralls killed by this ability leave overshield pickups.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The lost one rises. Reify the essence of the Eidolon as you wield Revenant Prime’s power.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Revenant Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Revenant Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Revenant Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Ki'Teer Cornu Diadem, Zenoriu Earpiece, Zato Earpiece/Oculus, Revenant Mephisto Mask/Diadem, and Respa Prime Mask looking incorrect on Clients. 
Fixed script error when a Revenant in the squad uses Mesmer Skin and then Reaves onto another Revenant, who then Reaves onto an enemy affected by Enthrall.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes: Added “Speed” stat in UI for Revenant’s Reave, and Gauss’ Mach Rush, and passive.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixes towards a crash caused by Revenant's Danse Macabre. 
Fixed Revenant Prime’s energy color along his back not changing from the default blue.
Fixed the Officium Syandana not sitting flush on Revenant’s back. 
Fixed script error with Revenant’s Enthrall.

patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the left Vetala Shoulder Plate being improperly offset when using the Revenant Skin with Revenant Prime. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1327266-left-shoulder-attachment-bug/
Fixed Revenant Prime's abilities missing VFX when using TennoGen skins with default energy colors. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1327617-revenant-prime/
Fixed Revenant Prime’s Noble and Agile animations causing clipping into his collar. 
Fixed script error if Host migration occurs while Revenant’s Danse Macabre is active.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.changes:
Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9:
Get instant access to the latest Prime Warframe with Revenant Prime Access. Add Revenant Prime along with his signature Prime Weapons Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime, and exclusive Prime Accessories along with Resource and Affinity Boosters to your Arsenal.
The lost one rises. Wield the essence of the Eidolon as you wield Revenant Prime’s power.
Tatsu Prime glows with spectral splendor. It grows more powerful with each enemy’s demise, especially when wielded by Revenant.
Phantasma Prime is burnished with deadly force. In Revenant’s hands, it has increased magazine capacity. The might of its irradiated plasma is reminiscent of the fearsome Eidolon.
Now that Revenant Prime Access is available, Relics containing components for the following items have been removed from Drop Tables and will return in Prime Resurgence at a later date. If you have Relics that contain these items they will remain in your Inventory.
Get Revenant Prime instantly with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Revenant Prime, Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime. Find the Prime Access packs here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access
Revenant In Action Glyph
Revenant Vania Helmet Blueprint
Revenant’s Reave ability changes:

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sister of Pavos Hounds becoming permanent allies (and blocking progression) if affected by abilities like Nyx’s Mind Control or Revenant’s Enthrall.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Toned down the brightness of Revenant’s Mesmer Skin FX. It will also now be hidden while in Archwing.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Judicial Coils, Zato Facial Accessory, Revenant Mephisto Mask, and a hair style being missing from Operator customization options.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant Mephisto Collection diorama in the Market missing the rear-cape detail. 👀

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant Mephisto Skin materials not appearing wet in the rain ;) .

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.1 + 30.7.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing double swords in Revenant Mephisto diorama.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
Embrace Revenant’s hybrid nature with a bold new form and dwell in the eternal twilight between realms.
*Similar to the Ember Pyraxis Attachments, the Revenant Mephisto Skin has a removable Syandana (more so a cape in this scenario) that can be equipped on either normal Revenant or Revenant Mephisto Skin. This Syandana is Exclusive to Revenant just as other Deluxe Skins attachments are exclusive to them. Please note that the “energy beard” on the original Revenant Helmet gets removed when the Mephisto Syandana is equipped due to excessive clipping. One could say we had to clip the beard.
Take on a touch of the devil with these Revenant Mephisto Operator accessories.
Includes the Revenant Mephisto Diadem, and Revenant Mephisto Mask.
Dwell in the eternal twilight with Revenant’s haunting Mephisto collection.
Includes Revenant Mephisto Skin, Revenant Mephisto Helmet, and Orison Two-Handed Nikana Skin.
Revenant's Danse Macabre ability now deals finisher damage against inanimate objects instead of adopting a damage type based on the target. It still does adaptive damage and applies adaptive status effects against enemies.
Prior to this change, Danse Macabre was allowing Revenant to solve Operator-required puzzles, which is clearly not intended.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error related to Revenant's abilities.
Fixed an issue where if you bullet jump with Revenant and then cast Danse Macabre his head would appear broken.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.1.0
patchlogs.changes:
featuring our first-ever Protea, Grendel and Revenant Skins!
Revenant Draugen Skin by Goosmo

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant Enthralled Mitosids permanently remain friendly after split, which can result in a Deimos Bounty progression stop.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur when joining a someone doing the Mask of the Revenant Quest.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to use/cancel any abilities or use Operator after casting Revenant’s Danse Macabre and getting knocked down or attempting to ledge grab during its animation.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a Revenant functionality loss if Reave is cast on an enemy who is both Enthralled and Blood Altared.  
Fixed cases of Revenant’s Reave hitting ragdolled enemies multiple times in rapid succession, potentially insta-killing them.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Revenant’s Danse Macabre and the Dual Cestra.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Enemies that are converted by Revenant's Enthrall energy pillar not appearing to have the Enthralled visuals around their head despite being friendly/affected.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards Defense missions breaking due to an inability to terminate enemies that have been changed to Ally status (Nyx Mind Control, Revenant Enthrall, etc), thus inability to complete the Defense Wave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: You can now sell your duplicate Garuda, Harrow, Octavia, Revenant, and Nidus Blueprints for 2500 Credits from your Inventory.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous harmless script crashes on when quitting the game with the Mask of the Revenant Quest active.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Revenant: 105 to 125

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Revenant’s Enthrall ability.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur if Revenant tried to Enthrall without a target.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Kuva Lich despawning after getting downed while temporarily friendly from Revenant's Enthrall.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Kuva Lich becoming allied until downed when the effects of Revenants Enthrall ability expire.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed becoming unarmed and unable to get your weapon back while in Revenant’s Danse Macabre.

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.changes: Revenant’s Reave ability is now an upper body animation only; alleviating momentum cancelling lower body animations.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed remaining players being unable to complete the Mask of the Revenant specter fight after a Host migration occurs.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Armored enemies affected by Revenant's Danse Macabre continuing to take Corrosive Damage after the Armor has gone, resulting in less damage because Flesh is stronger to Corrosive than Armor is.
Fixed Revenant’s Danse Macabre doing Corrosive Damage to Infested.
Fixed not being able to perform finishers on blinded enemies from Revenant’s Enthrall that are temporary allies (mind control, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant's Enthralled enemies not counting towards kills in Rathuum/Index.

patchlogs.name: Tenno Reinforcements: Update 25.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant specter not spawning reliably during the Mask of the Revenant quest if Host does not have the quest active.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.3.3 + 25.3.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Revenant's facing direction after using Reave during Danse Macabre.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to use Emotes while casting Revenant's Danse Macabre to prevent your Abilities getting stuck.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.2 + 25.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Revenant Thrall death pillars not causing damage on contact, only with projectiles for Clients.
Fixed Revenant Thralls created by pillar projectiles not showing its effect and cannot be damaged for Clients.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Wisp’s Sol Gate ability being able to damage Nullifier bubbles (and then killing the Nullifier). This follows precedent with other Warframe abilities that were fixed (Revenant).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zanuka being unable to capture Hildryn, Wisp, Revenant, Chroma, Frost, Excalibur, Inaros, Nova, Vauban, Volt, Wukong, Ash, Hydroid, Mag, Trinity, Titania and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Revenant's default Energy color being too green.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Revenant Blueprint

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes: Revenant and allies can now perform Finishers on enemies blinded by Revenant’s Reave with the Blinding Reave Augment equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.6.2 + 24.6.2.1
patchlogs.changes: The Tatsu Soul Swarm (Revenant) projectiles now have a lifetime of 5 seconds.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Secondary Energy colors not applying to certain things (Revenant's Helmet beard, etc).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Revenant Immortuos Helmet by Lubox
Fixed Revenant Reave being able to give a Mesmer Skin charge to Operators.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed "melee with fire weapon input" causing Revenant’s Danse Macabre to be unboostable when a Melee weapon is equipped.
Fixed a script error when casting Revenant’s Mesmer Skin ability.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Respective Ability videos now also appear upon hover-over to add that little extra spice! This initial Ability video aspect is currently functional for Excalibur, Mag, Volt, Garuda, Baruuk, Revenant, and Hildryn! More to gradually come!
Fixed Revenant becoming stuck in his spinning animations if he becomes downed during Danse Macabre. 
Changed Limbo’s Stasis to no longer affect temporarily friendly enemies (Nyx’s Mind Control, Revenant’s Enthrall).

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.4
patchlogs.changes: Revenant’s Reave now follows the direction of your reticle as opposed to always in a straight line. This allows you to steer it freely. You can of course maintain the original behaviour of a straight line by simply not aiming your reticle, but for those of you wanting better control over where Reave goes are now able to freely steer!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mask of the Revenant quest not progressing once you meet the prerequisites listed in the Codex. If you were affected by this bug, talking to Nakak in Cetus will allow you to progress.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Revenant’s Mesmer Skin ability.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.changes:
Revenant’s Reave wall width is now affected by Range Mods.
Revenant’s Reave now also sheds Status Effects on cast and applies them to targets it hits.
Fixed Revenant's Thralls not granting Affinity when killed. 
Fixed Revenant’s Danse Macabre being able to damage Nullifier bubbles (and then killing the Nullifier).
Fixed enemies affected by Revenant’s Enthrall and then a Radiation Status Effect being able to enthrall the Defense target, preventing the wave from ever ending.
Fixed Revenant Reave not using Modded Health/Shield steal values.
Fixed Revenant’s Reave Abilities page not properly showing the Modded Health/Shield steal values.
Fixed Revenant’s Thrall death pillars blocking projectiles.
Fixed various Syandana clipping issues with Revenant.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Stalker and Zanuka unable to target players after being Enthralled by Revenant or Chaos'd by Nyx, even after Ability expires.
Fixed the Revenant Warframe Blueprint not appearing in the Codex as a reward under any Eidolon variant.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Mask Of The Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1:

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Mask Of The Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0:
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed getting one-shotted through Revenant’s Mesmer Skin by a single very powerful hit. 
Fixed Ability immune enemies not decreasing the Mesmer Skin count when hitting Revenant.
Fixed Revenant’s Thrall FX not attaching properly to Vomvalysts.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Mask Of The Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.2:
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed very small squares remaining in the Map UI areas where Mask of the Revenant quest took place when returning to the Plains.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Revenant Mesmer smoke effect is now only seen on yourself, not other players, to improve performance and visibility.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with lingering FX resulting from Revenant frequently using Reave and Danse Macabre.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.changes:
We have a big batch of changes to Revenant based on constructive player feedback. Specifics per ability follow below, but a big thanks to everyone who took the time to login, play, and visit a space (forums or otherwise) to give their thoughts. It's crucial to the iteration process. Thank you!
just as Revenant did. The general rule Thralls will follow is they provide CC in Life, Damage in Death. The goal is simply to have an easy supply of Thralls to make use of in both Life and Death.
While active, the pillar creates homing projectiles similar to the Vomvalyst attacks and Revenant's Signature weapon, the Phantasma!
Revenant is now fully immune to damage while Reaving 
When REAVE is cast while in DANSE MACABRE, Energy cost lowered to 25. This allows for quicker, risk-free placement of Revenant for tactical maneuvering.
Reverted an unintentional reduction of Revenant’s max Energy. His max Energy is now as it was before 23.8.0.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Revenant’s Reave using the wrong value (Health) for Shield gain.
Fixed inability to damage Revenant’s Enthralled enemies with the Arca Plasmor.
Fixed Revenant’s Enthralled enemies still attempting to hack terminals during Interception missions. 
Fixed Gara’s Mass Vitrify blocking Revenant’s Danse Macabre lasers.
Fixed Revenant’s Danse Macabre and Strangledome names being in ALL CAPS.
Fixed Clients Transferring to Operator and back resulting in Revenant’s Mesmer Skin charge indicator being removed on the ability UI.
Fixed Revenant Reave being capable of flying.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Mask Of The Revenant: Hotfix 23.7.1:

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Mask Of The Revenant: Update 23.7.0:
patchlogs.fixes: Revenant changes/fixes are still in the works

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to start the Revenant miniquest immediately after reaching Rank 2 with the Quills without leaving Cetus and returning.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Revenant Fixes & Changes:

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.5.0
patchlogs.changes:
* To invoke a more Sentient theme with Revenant, the last detail to change since past Devstream presentations is his Danse Macabre Damage. Sentients in the wild can often adapt to your attacks...so the damage output of the Danse Macabre now can adapt to certain enemy defenses!
Added Revenant fragments the Origin System.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: New Single-Sword Stance: Vengeful Revenant! Hate... Dread... Despair…!
